---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible defect
title: "fix: "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Background

What is broken and why does it matter?

## Reproduction

Command, request, data, or UI path.

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happened?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Failure is reproduced
- [ ] Regression test is added when practical
- [ ] Fix is verified locally

## AI Usage Record

Was AI used for debugging, review, or test generation?
